settings.notify_new_discussion_label: Someone creates a discussion in a tag I'm following
settings.notify_new_post_label: Someone posts in a tag I'm following
settings.notify_new_discussion_tag_label: Someone re-tags a discussion to a tag I'm following

sub_controls.following_text: Be notified of all new discussions.
sub_controls.hiding_text: Hide discussions from All Discussions page.
sub_controls.lurking_text: Be notified of all new discussions and replies.
sub_controls.notify_alert_tooltip: Get a forum notification when there are new discussions or posts
sub_controls.notify_email_tooltip: Get an email when there are new discussions or posts

settings.heading: Follow Tags
settings.filter_label: What to show by default in the Following page

settings.prompt_new_users_label: Prompt new users to choose tags to follow
settings.prompt_new_users_help: Users who have not confirmed their choice yet will be shown a modal asking them to follow tags. The modal will keep coming back on each visit until they press "Continue to forum".
settings.prompt_button_on_following_page_label: Show a "Choose tags to follow" button on the Following page
settings.prompt_tag_strategy_label: Tags to offer in the prompt

prompt_tag_strategy_options.primaryAndChildren: All primary tags of any level
prompt_tag_strategy_options.primaryAndSecondary: First-level primary tags and secondary tags

settings.all_discussions_on_following_page_for_gu: Show all discussions on the Following page for guests

tagsubscription.export_description: Exports details of the subscription level for a tag, if one exists.
tagsubscription.anonymize_description: Removes the subscription of the user to the tag.
